question: Nigaar told us about her father, Ghafur Agha Gawra — tall, important, a big-landowner family with properties, a hammam, and a Sulaimaniyah house Mom's mother grew up next door to. By the time you met Nigaar, was Ghafur Agha still alive? Did you ever meet him? Any memory of his household in Baghdad or Sulaimaniyah?
answer: By the time I knew Nigaar, Ghafur Agha was deceased many, many years before that. So, I, I knew about him because his son Kamal was still alive, which is, uh, my wife's uncle. And, uh, we were most of the night we went to, uh, Slimaniya Club together with his friends, many other friends.
